title: Expression and purification protocol of Homo sapiens E2-like enzyme ATG3
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bq3ao","text":"This protocol describes expression and purification procedures for obtaining human recombinant autophagy E2-like enzyme ATG3 (ATG, AuTophaGy-related protein) of the ATG8 ubiquitin-like conjugation system.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"9uqrk","text":"General information","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9hc07","text":"Insert: Homo sapiens ATG3, NP_071933.2; Expression system: E.Coli Rosetta pLyss; plasmid origin: Sascha Martens Lab, Addgene 169079, lab internal construct database number SMC861; backbone: pET-Duet1; plasmid resistance: Ampicillin; tags \u0026 cleavage sites: N-term 6xHis, followed by Tobacco Etch Virus (TEV) cleavage site, ATG3 ORF. Ext coeff: 45840 M-1 cm-1 , MW 35.8 kDa.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":8,"length":12},{"style":"italic","offset":59,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7a6lg","text":"For hazard information and safety warnings, please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bknht","text":"Materials and Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cmo0e","text":"Escherichia coli Rosetta pLyss cells","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9s8i4","text":"Luria Bertani (LB) medium with antibiotics (final conc. 50µg/ml Ampicillin, 34µg/ml Chloramphenicol)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1psi4","text":"IPTG (isopropyl-b-d-thiogalactopyranoside)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4i7jv","text":"37°C shaker incubator","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52mqf","text":"sterile flasks/sterile pipettes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9afjs","text":"tip sonicator","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1v3cu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aok4l","text":"Lysis Buffer: 50mM Hepes pH=7.5; 300mM NaCl, 10mM Imidazole, 2mM MgCl2, 2mM β-mercaptoethanol, 1mM Pefablock, Complete Protease Inhibitors (EDTA-free CIP tablet, Roche), DNAse (Sigma). ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13},{"style":"sub","offset":69,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2vnt","text":"Buffer A: 50mM Hepes pH=7.5, 300mM NaCl, 10mM Imidazole (filtered and degassed) + 1mM β-mercaptoethanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fom6q","text":"Buffer B: 50mM Hepes pH=7.5, 300mM NaCl, 300mM Imidazole (filtered and degassed) + 1mM β-mercaptoethanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"36hfj","text":"Size Exclusion Chromatography (SEC) Buffer: 25mM Hepes pH=7.5, 150mM NaCl (filtered and degassed) + 1mM DTT (Dithiothreitol)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":43}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8jttc","text":"Note: all purification buffers are filtered and degassed. Reducing agents (β-mercaptoethanol and Dithiothreitol) are added after degassing step.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1rb04","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ti1s","text":"Columns: - HT 5ml column (GE Healthcare)  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dan8a","text":"                    - S75_16/60 (GE Healthcare)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5adhc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7edci","text":"Gels: 10% SDS-PAGE","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cells are lised via freeze/thaw cycles and sonication: thaw pellet corresponding to 1 L culture by freeze/thawing in Room temperature water bath. All following steps are to be executed at 4 °C or on ice.
Lyse cells by sonicating them using an immersion tip Sonicator ( 2x 00:00:30 ). Note: adjust times and intensity according to the available instrument.
Clear lysate by spinning it down in a Beckman centrifuge at 40000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes, Ti45 Rotor .
Filter supernatant through a 0.45 µm filter and inject onto a 5ml HT column operating at 4 °C pre-equilibrated in Buffer A at 1ml/min flow rate.
Wash column with 5 column volumes (CV), of Buffer A at 2 ml/min flow rate to remove unspecific bound proteins.

Elute protein of interest through a step elution gradient in 50mM, 75mM, 100mM, 150mM, 200mM and 300mM Imidazole concentration. Perform elution at 1ml/min flow rate. Collect peak fractions at each step.

Check peak fractions of each step on a SDS-PAGE (see gel below). Pool and concentrate those containing the protein of interest (usually 100mM and 150mM Imidazole step) by spinning at 4 °C down in a 10kDa cut-off Amicon Filter to 2 mL, final volume . Centrifugation steps are kept short ( 00:05:00 ) to avoid protein local concentration/aggregation on the filter. Coomassie BB stained gel of His-tag affinity purification for hATG3.
Inject 2 mL, protein onto a S75_16/600 column operating at 4 °C and pre-equilibrated in buffer containing SEC Buffer (see profile below). Chromatograph of Size Exclusion purification for hATG3.

Check fractions on a 10% SDS-PAGE (see gel below). Pool and concentrate those containing the protein of interest down at 4 °C in a 10kDa cut-off Amicon Filter. Centrifugation steps are kept short ( 00:05:00 ) to avoid protein local concentration/aggregation on the filter. Coomassie BB stained gel of Size Exclusion Chromatography purification for hATG3.
Measure protein Absorbance A 280 using a Spectrophotometer blanking against SEC buffer (MW = 35,864 kDa ; Extinction coefficient = 45840M -1 cm -1 ).

Resuspend protein in Glycerol to a final concentration of 30 % (v/v), for glycerol . Store the protein batch at -20 °C . Estimated protein yield: 10 mg, per 1 lt culture . Protein activity is kept for 18 months.
Transform plasmid DNA (Addgene 169079, SMC861) into E.Coli Rosetta pLyss cells and plate on Ampicillin/Chloramphenicol LB agar plate for Overnight growth at 37 °C .
The following day, inoculate a 100 mL, LB + Amp/Cam pre-culture with 1-2 colonies and grow Overnight at 37 °C shaking.
The following day, use 20 mL, pre-culture to inoculate 1 L, LB medium + Amp/Cam at 37 °C until an OD 600 (Optical Density at 600nm) of 0.4 is reached.
Cool down the culture to 18 °C and grow until OD 600 = 0.8.
Induce protein expression with 100 micromolar (µM), IPTG and keep shaking for a further 16:00:00 at 18 °C .
Pellet cells at 4000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes in a Sorvall RC6+ centrifuge (Thermo Scientific), discard supernatant and resuspend pellets in ice cold lysis buffer (25 ml/1 lt culture).
Flash freeze resuspended pellets in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until purification.
Perform His-Trap affinity purification followed by Size Exclusion Chromatography.
creator: Dorotea Fracchiolla
